# Novus Getting Started

## Primary AI-oriented document

- [AI Documentation: Novus and Nox](./AI_GUIDE.md)

## Human-readable docs that are also useful to agents

- [Install Novus and Nox](./docs/guide/install/index.html)
- [Your First Project](./docs/guide/first-project/index.html)
- [Language Tour](./docs/guide/language-tour/index.html)
- [Inline Assembly](./docs/guide/inline-assembly/index.html)
- [Working with std](./docs/guide/working-with-std/index.html)
- [Nox and Libraries](./docs/guide/nox-and-libraries/index.html)
- [Building the Platformer](./docs/walkthroughs/platformer/index.html)
- [Building the Todo App](./docs/walkthroughs/todo-app/index.html)
- [Authoring Libraries](./docs/reference/library-authoring/index.html)
- [Troubleshooting](./docs/reference/troubleshooting/index.html)

## Scope

This repository explains:

- how to install and verify Novus + Nox
- how a Nox-managed Novus project is structured
- how to write normal Novus code
- how to use `std`
- how to use inline assembly builtins such as `mov`, `getreg`, `syscall`, and `win_call`
- how to structure libraries for the Novus ecosystem
- how the platformer and Todo-App are organised
